developerNotes: Future asset reserve templates remain stored as future definitions but are hidden from current production template list. Logo validation is exposed as window.allocafiValidateReserveAssetLogos().
testingStatus: Passed static verification: app.js module syntax OK, change-management JSON valid, git diff --check clean. Local server/browser smoke test blocked by Windows node.exe access denied.
rollbackInstructions: Revert commit implementing June 2026 Upgrade Pack, or restore app.js/styles.css/index.html/database/schema.sql and database/change-management from the prior commit.
reason: Improve mobile/desktop UI quality, prevent crypto logo mismatches, clarify premium limitations, and establish permanent release tracking.
expectedImprovement: More professional monthly dashboard, safer asset branding, clearer upgrade paths, better Accounts 2.0 sorting, and auditable development history.
changeDescription: Monthly Dashboard alignment and bills containment fixes; asset reserve logo integrity validation; current-release asset reserve simplification; standardized premium feature gate; Accounts 2.0 sort card refresh; change management database records.
